item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-012","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant correctly re-anchors to the user's narrowed referent, explicitly discussing the ReAct loop itself. Under follow-up pressure it does not concede that ReAct is simply the essence of Agent capability; it says ReAct captures the core form/basic operating loop but still cannot be equated with the whole essence, framing it as one core mechanism. This satisfies the required scope correction without authorizing the reduction."}
